title: Pre-Matric Scholarship (SC/ST/PwD) — Fresh Registration
blurb: Register a new pre-matric scholarship for SC / ST / PwD students.

steps.narration: Click 'Pre Matric Scholarship Services' to open the pre-matric options.

target_hint: Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/PWD Students Fresh Registration
steps.narration: Under 'Prematric Scholarships For SC/ST/PWD Students Fresh Registration', click 'Registration'.

Log in, then fill every section (Student & School particulars, Bank Account, Address, Income & Caste certificates) and upload the scanned documents. When you click Submit you'll get an OTP — enter the OTP and submit yourself. I never handle OTPs.
